title: Voucher cổ điển — viền nét đứt đỏ
description: Coupon giấy phong cách truyền thống, viền nét đứt, tông đỏ-trắng dễ đọc.
base_prompt: Vietnamese discount voucher in classic coupon style: bold dashed red border on white background, large title '{campaign_title}' in centered serif Vietnamese typography, prominent discount badge showing '{discount}' in bright red, brand name '{brand_name}' at top, call-to-action text '{cta_text}' at bottom, QR code embedded at bottom-right corner showing this URL: {qr_url}, clean print-ready layout, high contrast, sharp text, photorealistic paper texture. {custom_detail}

title: Voucher hiện đại — gradient tím-hồng
description: Voucher phong cách modern SaaS, gradient tím sang hồng, QR slot góc phải.
base_prompt: Modern Vietnamese promotional voucher with smooth purple-to-pink gradient background, geometric shapes, large headline '{campaign_title}' in clean sans-serif white typography, huge discount label '{discount}' with subtle glow, brand '{brand_name}' top-left in minimal logo style, CTA pill button '{cta_text}' in white at bottom-center, QR code in bottom-right corner pointing to {qr_url}, premium SaaS aesthetic, soft shadows. {custom_detail}

title: Voucher cao cấp — đen vàng kim
description: Phong cách luxury: nền đen sâu, chữ vàng kim, typography serif sang trọng.
base_prompt: Luxury Vietnamese gift voucher: deep matte black background, ornate gold filigree border, elegant serif Vietnamese typography in gold for title '{campaign_title}', refined discount line '{discount}' rendered as engraved gold script, brand name '{brand_name}' in classy small caps at top, subtle CTA '{cta_text}' at bottom, small QR code lower-right linking {qr_url}, jewelry-store premium aesthetic, photorealistic gold foil texture. {custom_detail}

title: Ảnh QC sản phẩm — hero vuông
description: Sản phẩm trung tâm, tagline ngắn gọn, layout 1:1 cho Facebook/Instagram feed.
base_prompt: Vietnamese product hero advertisement, square format: featured product centered with dramatic 3-point studio lighting on clean pastel background, brand '{brand_name}' top-left, large punchy headline '{campaign_title}' top-right in bold Vietnamese sans-serif, short tagline '{cta_text}' bottom-center, optional discount badge '{discount}' top-right corner, small QR code bottom-right pointing to {qr_url}, magazine-quality commercial photography. {custom_detail}

title: Poster sự kiện — dọc 9:16
description: Poster sự kiện dạng story dọc: ngày, địa điểm, CTA, QR cuối poster.
base_prompt: Vertical Vietnamese event poster, 9:16 portrait orientation: bold modern background composition, top section displays event title '{campaign_title}' in massive impactful Vietnamese display font, middle section shows event details and CTA '{cta_text}', bottom section features brand '{brand_name}' alongside a clearly-readable QR code linking to {qr_url}, vivid color palette, suitable for Facebook story / printed A4 portrait poster. {custom_detail}

title: Banner khuyến mãi — ngang 16:9
description: Banner web/Facebook cover ngang, chữ to dễ đọc trên màn hình nhỏ.
base_prompt: Horizontal 16:9 promotional banner for Vietnamese small business: split layout with vibrant brand color on left third showing brand '{brand_name}' and small QR code linking {qr_url}, right two-thirds displays huge attention-grabbing headline '{campaign_title}' with discount '{discount}' rendered as oversized number, CTA button '{cta_text}' bottom-right, modern flat design with one accent illustration, optimized for Facebook cover and website hero. {custom_detail}

title: Thẻ QR tối giản
description: Thẻ QR đặt giữa, brand bên dưới, hợp in standee và menu bàn.
base_prompt: Minimalist Vietnamese QR scan card, 1:1 square: clean off-white background, large prominent QR code centered (occupying ~55% of frame) encoding the URL {qr_url}, short call-to-action '{cta_text}' above QR in friendly Vietnamese sans-serif, brand '{brand_name}' below QR in small refined typography, subtle accent line. Ultra-clean Apple-style minimalism, print-ready 300dpi. {custom_detail}

title: Thẻ QR menu bàn — quán cafe
description: Thẻ để bàn nhà hàng/cafe: 'Quét để xem menu', tone ấm gỗ.
base_prompt: Vietnamese restaurant/cafe table QR card, 4:5 portrait: warm cream background with subtle wood texture, top text 'QUÉT MÃ ĐỂ XEM MENU' in elegant Vietnamese serif, large QR code centered (45% size) encoding URL {qr_url}, restaurant name '{brand_name}' bottom in handwritten-style script, small CTA '{cta_text}' below QR, photorealistic light shadow at base suggesting card stands on table. {custom_detail}

title: Thẻ QR phong cách Wi-Fi
description: Thẻ QR thiết kế kiểu thẻ Wi-Fi: dễ đọc, đầy đủ thông tin.
base_prompt: Vietnamese WiFi-style information card 1:1: rounded card with soft drop shadow on pastel background, header strip with WiFi/connect icon plus brand '{brand_name}' in modern Vietnamese sans-serif, large central QR code (50% size) encoding URL {qr_url}, instruction line '{cta_text}' below QR, optional discount badge '{discount}' as tag in top-right corner, vibrant friendly colors, looks like the QR Wi-Fi cards found in trendy cafes. {custom_detail}

title: Name card hiện đại 16:9
description: Name card tiêu chuẩn 85x55mm, layout 2 cột, QR mặt sau.
base_prompt: Modern Vietnamese business card, 16:9 landscape, clean minimal layout: left side features brand '{brand_name}' in large bold Vietnamese sans-serif typography with thin accent line, right side stacks contact info derived from '{cta_text}' (name, role, phone, email) plus a small QR code in bottom-right corner linking {qr_url}, premium matte paper texture, balanced typography hierarchy, white background with single brand accent color. {custom_detail}

title: Name card sáng tạo — màu khối
description: Name card phong cách màu khối táo bạo cho ngành sáng tạo.
base_prompt: Creative Vietnamese business card 16:9: bold color-block design with diagonal split between two vibrant brand colors, oversized brand initial of '{brand_name}' on color side, contact info '{cta_text}' and QR code linking {qr_url} on the lighter side, modern sans-serif typography, premium textured paper feel, perfect for creative agency / designer / photographer. {custom_detail}

title: Thiệp mời sang trọng 4:5
description: Thiệp mời event tone elegant — phù hợp grand opening, tiệc khai trương.
base_prompt: Elegant Vietnamese event invitation card, 4:5 portrait: ivory background with delicate gold botanical illustrations in corners, refined serif Vietnamese typography for title '{campaign_title}' centered top, event details and date in middle, host name '{brand_name}' in italic script, RSVP CTA '{cta_text}' at bottom along with small classy QR code linking {qr_url}, high-end wedding/grand-opening stationery aesthetic, soft warm lighting. {custom_detail}
